name: Probationary Period
text: The Employee shall be on probation for an initial period as specified in this Agreement, during which the employment may be confirmed, extended, or terminated in accordance with applicable law and the terms herein.
invalid_if: Probation period is excessively long without justification
Probation is used to deny statutory rights
title: Probation Period
dispute_hotspots: Extension of probation without notice — employee claims confirmation by lapse of time
Termination during probation for misconduct — natural justice still required for cause-based discharge
